# Null

`modifier.null` · Utility

Passes the field through unchanged: a point to view, reroute, or anchor wiring.

## Purpose

Passes the field through unchanged. Reach for it as a point to view, a place to reroute wiring, or an anchor that keeps a graph tidy.

## Inputs

- `in`

## Outputs

- `out`

## Parameters

This node has no parameters.

## Layer contract

Reads and writes the height layer.
